Class Teacher

java.lang.Object
users.User
users.Employee
users.Teacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Teacher extends Employee
Represents a university teacher. Manages courses, student marks, schedule and student ratings.
See Also:

    • addRating

      public void addRating(int rating)

      public double getAverageRating()
      Returns average student rating, or 0.0 if no ratings yet.

    • viewCourses

      public void viewCourses()
      Prints all assigned courses.

    • viewSchedule

      public void viewSchedule()
      Prints the teacher's lesson schedule.

    • putMark

      public void putMark(Student student, Course course, double att1, double att2, double finalExam)
      Creates a mark from three components and adds it to student's transcript.
      Parameters:
      att1 - first attestation score
      att2 - second attestation score
      finalExam - final exam score
